name: SwitchComponent
description:
The Switch component is used to activate or deactivate an element.
It uses a visual metaphor to inform the user of the state of the switch.

inputs.name: activeText
inputs.description: Optional text for the active state of the switch.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: aria-label attribute of the inner input element.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: aria-labelledby attribute of the inner input element.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id for the switch component. If omitted, a unique one is generated.

inputs.name: inactiveText
inputs.description: Optional text for the inactive state of the switch.

outputs.name: checkedChange
outputs.description:
Event fired when the state of the switch changes.
*$event* can be used to retrieve the new state of the switch.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Set focus on the input element.
